name: My Amazing Boyfriend 2: Unforgettable Impression
original_name: 我的奇妙男友2之恋恋不忘
overview: After mutant Xue Lingqiao leaves actress Tian Jingzhi for her own good, she discovers she’s pregnant. Lingqiao secretly moves in next door to protect her, but a mysterious organization targets her and the unborn child.

trailers.title: MY AMAZING BOYFRIEND 2: UNFORGETTABLE IMPRESSION - OFFICIAL TRAILER | Mike D'Angelo, Esther Yu
